name: goliath/svc-heavy-duty
title: Services – Heavy Duty / Built to Last
description: Before/after hover image swap with feature list.

description.default: Installing GOLIATH™ on new racking projects provides unmatched protection and long-term value for your warehouse infrastructure.

feat1Desc.default: Install GOLIATH™ on new racking to prevent damage before it happens. Proactive protection saves money and ensures safety from the start.

feat2Desc.default: Installing GOLIATH™ during initial setup is even quicker than retrofitting. Integrate protection seamlessly into your new warehouse project.

feat3Desc.default: Your new racking comes with permanent protection. Never worry about upright damage again with our comprehensive lifetime warranty.

feat4Desc.default: Avoid future repair costs entirely. Installing GOLIATH™ upfront is the most cost-effective approach for long-term warehouse operations.
